target_variable: EMM_proxy (MXI ETF proxy — scale to USD/tonne via calibration)
scaling_note: To convert proxy index to USD/tonne: multiply by calibration_factor. Calibration: avg(EMM_spot_USD_tonne) / avg(EMM_proxy) over overlap period. As of 2025, ~1 index point ≈ $25–35 USD/tonne (indicative only).
